TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami_Tisilan, title = Tisilan, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Amis]}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/wiki/Tisilan} }

S.FORM: Tisilan Itiniay i Fengbin Cen no Hualien ko Tisilan a niyaro', 87 ko sa'osi no parod no loma', 239 ko sa'osi no tamdaw. 79% ko ka'aloman no Yincomin, polong han i, 190 ko tamdaw; o roma sato i, 21% ko ka'aloman no roma a finacadan, polong han i, 49 ko tamdaw. O pa-sin-to no ka'aloman no tamdaw no kasafinacadan i, ko Amis75%, Paiwan1%, roma2%.
S.PHON: tisi…ĺan itiniaj i f…ôŇčb~b~vin ¶…ôn no~u ńßo~u~ua…ĺi…ôn ko~u tisi…ĺan a nijaro~u °, ** ko~u sa °o~usi no~u paro~u…¨~…ģ no~u …ĺo~uma °, *** ko~u sa °o~usi no~u tam…¨~…ģaw. **% ko~u ka °a…ĺo~uman no~u jin ¶o~umin, po~u…ĺo~uŇč ńßan i, *** ko~u tam…¨~…ģaw; o~u ro~uma sato~u i, **% ko~u ka °a…ĺo~uman no~u ro~uma a fina ¶a…¨~…ģan, po~u…ĺo~uŇč ńßan i, ** ko~u tam…¨~…ģaw. o~u pa-sin-to~u no~u ka °a…ĺo~uman no~u tam…¨~…ģaw no~u kasafina ¶a…¨~…ģan i, ko~u amis**%, paiwan*%, ro~uma*%.
S.FORM: Tisilan Itiniay i Fengbin Cen no Hualien ko Tisilan a niyaro', 87 ko sa'osi no parod no loma', 239 ko sa'osi no tamdaw. 79% ko ka'aloman no Yincomin, polong han i, 190 ko tamdaw; o roma sato i, 21% ko ka'aloman no roma a finacadan, polong han i, 49 ko tamdaw. O pa-sin-to no ka'aloman no tamdaw no kasafinacadan i, ko Amis75%, Paiwan1%, roma2%.
S.PHON: tisi…ĺan itiniaj i f…ôŇčb~b~vin ¶…ôn no~u ńßo~u~ua…ĺi…ôn ko~u tisi…ĺan a nijaro~u °, ** ko~u sa °o~usi no~u paro~u…¨~…ģ no~u …ĺo~uma °, *** ko~u sa °o~usi no~u tam…¨~…ģaw. **% ko~u ka °a…ĺo~uman no~u jin ¶o~umin, po~u…ĺo~uŇč ńßan i, *** ko~u tam…¨~…ģaw; o~u ro~uma sato~u i, **% ko~u ka °a…ĺo~uman no~u ro~uma a fina ¶a…¨~…ģan, po~u…ĺo~uŇč ńßan i, ** ko~u tam…¨~…ģaw. o~u pa-sin-to~u no~u ka °a…ĺo~uman no~u tam…¨~…ģaw no~u kasafina ¶a…¨~…ģan i, ko~u amis**%, paiwan*%, ro~uma*%.
